name: Roasted White Corn Salsa
recipeIngredient: 2 Cups sweet white corn, cut from cob
1/3 Cup red bell pepper, finely diced
1/3 Cup chopped or a combination of herbs (such as cilantro)
recipeInstructions:
1. Toss corn with oil and lightly season with salt and pepper.
2. Spread the corn in a single layer on a baking sheet.
3. Roast in a preheated 425°F (220°C) oven until very lightly browned.
4. Cool, then add to a bowl with the rest of the ingredients.
5. Stir well and cover.
6. Store refrigerated for up to 5 days.
